test.status:
Several failures occurred:
1) Reason: The Xview Logo doesn't match with the reference.
2) Reason: The EPG Button doesn't match with the reference.
3) Reason: The Kids Button doesn't match with the reference.
4) Reason: The VOD Button doesn't match with the reference.
5) Reason: The My Contents Button doesn't match with the reference.
6) Reason: The Search Button doesn't match with the reference.
7) Reason: The Settings Rail doesn't match with the reference.
